$schema: Interaction sequence for driving VM installation.
$actions: See possible actions in the actions.json file
$variables: Define defaults below. ${vmName}, ${hostType}, ${guestKey} are built-in. Use ${varName} in step parameters.
description: Ubuntu Server (with ubuntu-desktop): dismiss GRUB, wait for unattended autoinstall + reboot + GDM, complete first login. No Install-button click — subiquity runs hands-off via autoinstall's interactive-sections:[].

steps.description: Dismiss the Ubuntu Server live-ISO GRUB menu — pressing Enter boots the default entry and autoinstall takes over (no UI confirmation needed, unlike the Desktop ISO).
Wait for subiquity to finish (including the ubuntu-desktop download via squid-cache, ~2GB) + reboot + GDM login screen.
passwd --expire forced this dialog — re-enter current password
Wait for the auto-opened gnome-terminal shell prompt. CAREFUL: the same string is also the window title, so OCR can false-match — tune pollSeconds if needed.
Reuse the desktop update script — ubuntu-desktop is the same package regardless of whether it came from the Desktop ISO or ubuntu-desktop-on-server.
Reboot so the next sequence starts from a clean GDM state.
